title: Scout Report
description: Structured output contract for the scout stage: read-only codebase exploration that gathers implementation context per requirement. The enrichments entries are appended in place to the brief's requirements as their scout blocks.

id.description: R# id from the brief — one entry per requirement, no omissions

files.description: Key files relevant to this R# (path:line-range — brief note). 2-5 per R#, chosen to save the implementer time, not to catalogue.

context.description: Key findings: conventions to match, type signatures, gotchas. 2-4 per R#.

approach.description: How to implement this R# — one paragraph, concrete

notes.description: Anything non-obvious the brief might not have considered: edge cases, integration gotchas. Empty string if none.

verification.description: Concrete checks to run after implementation, discovered during exploration
